label_protocol_ch1: 500 ng of RNA from each sample were reverse transcribed into cDNA and thereby labeled with biotin-UTP following manufacturer protocols.
hyb_protocol: Illumina HumanHT-12 v4 Expression BeadChip arrays using Illumina standard protocol.
scan_protocol: BeadChips were scanned using the Illumina BeadArray Reader and the BeadScan Software (Illumina).
data_processing: Raw data was obtained via the GenomeStudio; data have been normalized using the RSN method from R-package lumi.
